Case_exposed.description: Number of matched pairs where the case was exposed to oral contraceptives, broken down by control exposure status. Used to reconstruct the unmatched 2-by-2 table.

Case_not_exposed.description: Number of matched pairs where the case was not exposed to oral contraceptives, broken down by control exposure status. Used to reconstruct the unmatched 2-by-2 table.

Control_exposed_total.description: Total number of matched pairs where the control was exposed to oral contraceptives. Used as the control exposed count in the unmatched table.

Control_not_exposed_total.description: Total number of matched pairs where the control was not exposed to oral contraceptives. Used as the control not-exposed count in the unmatched table.
